title: spermacoce bartlingiana
intro: Spermacoce bartlingiana, also known as Bartling's Spermacoce, is a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spermacoce bartlingiana include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and urinary tract infections. Spermacoce bartlingiana is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used in herbal medicine to provide relief from various health conditions.
